description.value: Class Skills Bonus Spells Revelations Some oracles seek meaning in the pattern of the stars across the night sky, the trails of comets, and the eternal orbits of the planets. Class Skills A stargazer adds Knowledge (nature), Perception, and Survival to her list of class skills. These replace the additional class skills from her mystery. Bonus Spells These bonus spells replace the oracleâs mystery bonus spells at these levels: faerie fire (2nd), glitterdust (4th), guiding star (6th), wandering star motes (8th), meteor swarm (18th). Revelations A stargazer must take the following revelations at the listed levels. Guiding Star (Su): As the heavens mystery revelation. You must take this revelation at 1st level. Star Chart (Ex): As the heavens mystery revelation. You must take this revelation at 7th level. Recommended Mysteries: dark tapestry, heavens, lore, nature, time.
